get.description: List dead outbox messages (admin only).

delete.description: Permanently discard one dead outbox message (admin only).

post.description: Requeue one dead outbox message (admin only).

get.description: List reports (admin only).

put.description: Resolve report with accepted/rejected status (admin only).

post.description: Verify the account email using a valid one-time token.
Create or resend a one-time email verification token for the authenticated user. The token is delivered through the configured mail sender with a frontend verification link.
Create a server-generated guest account and return bearer token in Authorization response header.
Upgrade current guest account into a regular account.
Authenticate user and return bearer token in Authorization response header.
Reset the account password using a valid one-time token.
Create a one-time password reset token and deliver it through the configured mail sender.

get.description: Returns board list with cursor pagination.

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by previous list response
parameters.name: cursor

put.description: Updates a board by UUID (admin only).

delete.description: Deletes a board by UUID (admin only).

get.description: Returns published posts in a board with cursor pagination. Supports latest, hot, best, and top ordering.

parameters.description: Board sort: hot, best, latest, top
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Top window: 24h, 7d, 30d, all (allowed only when sort=top)
parameters.name: window

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by previous list response
parameters.name: cursor

post.description: Creates a post in a board identified by UUID.
Creates a draft post in a board identified by UUID.

get.description: GET returns reactions for a comment.

put.description: PUT creates or updates the current user's reaction on a comment.

delete.description: DELETE removes the current user's reaction on a comment.

get.description: Returns the global post feed ordered by hot, best, latest, or top with cursor pagination.

parameters.description: Feed sort: hot, best, latest, top
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Top window: 24h, 7d, 30d, all (allowed only when sort=top)
parameters.name: window

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by previous feed response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Returns published posts matching title, content, and tag tokens with cursor pagination. Supports relevance, hot, latest, and top ordering.

parameters.description: Search sort: relevance, hot, latest, top
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Top window: 24h, 7d, 30d, all (allowed only when sort=top)
parameters.name: window

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by previous search response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Retrieves post detail by UUID.
Returns attachments for a published post.

post.description: Uploads a file and creates attachment metadata for a post.

delete.description: Deletes attachment metadata from a post.

get.description: Returns the stored file for an attachment of a published post.
Returns the stored file for an attachment of a draft or published post for the owner or admin.
Returns comments in post with cursor pagination.

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by previous list response
parameters.name: cursor

post.description: Creates a comment on a post.

get.description: Returns a draft post by UUID for the owner or admin.

post.description: Publishes a draft post by UUID.

get.description: GET returns reactions for a post.

put.description: PUT creates or updates the current user's reaction on a post.

delete.description: DELETE removes the current user's reaction on a post.

post.description: Create a report for a post or comment.

get.description: Returns published posts connected to a tag with cursor pagination. Supports latest, hot, best, and top ordering.

parameters.description: Tag sort: hot, best, latest, top
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Top window: 24h, 7d, 30d, all (allowed only when sort=top)
parameters.name: window

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by previous list response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile.

delete.description: Delete the authenticated user account with password confirmation.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's draft posts.
Returns notifications for the authenticated user with cursor pagination.

patch.description: Marks all notifications as read for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns unread notification count for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Marks one notification as read for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the current suspension status for a user (admin only).

put.description: Suspend a user from post/comment write actions (admin only).
